story.text:
# 🚪 shor_mage (the go-kit)
**gateway** · shared · knowledge

A portable go-kit where the V6 framework (dihedral algebra · V(π,t) · held-out gate · City-persona harness) is applied to ecdsa.fail circuit optimization. The operational instance of the Horizon District: Eos/Dokimé/Poros appear here as quantum-circuit agent roles. Carries THE_AGENTPRIVACY_EDGE prediction. trailmix toolchain + GPU island search (1221q SOTA).

## Edges out

- *references* → [[ecdsa.fail (the arena)]]
- *kin_to* → [[Archon]]
- *kin_to* → [[the Horizon District]]
- *introduces* → [[the Agentprivacy Edge (prediction)]]
- *implements* → [[Dual-Agent Harness]]
